epigraph.quote: When he sat in his vicarage, the spire appeared over his church - the White Mark.

moments.place: Haddenham & Thame Parkway railway station, Buckinghamshire, UK
moments.quote: William + Joseph got off the train directly opposite us, William carrying a scooter + an enormous pack.
We saw a new housing estate & a steam train at Chinnor station.

moments.place: Whiteleaf Cross, Princes Risborough, Buckinghamshire, UK
moments.quote: Simon + William walked up the hill to the White Mark.
